final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational knowledge card infographic for children about the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms period.

Style/medium: cartoon illustration knowledge card, single large card layout
Composition: title at top, key bullet points listed with labels on the side, main area filled with cartoon story scenes
Subject: Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) — Three Kingdoms story for children
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 赤壁之战
Constraints: child-friendly cartoon art style; title must be clearly visible; key story points bulleted and labeled alongside the illustration; knowledge card presented as a cartoon narrative story
Avoid:
